scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n api,frontend,landing -c green,blue,magenta --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev -w=api" "npm run dev -w=frontend" "npm run dev -w=landing"
scripts.dev:telegram: npx concurrently -n api,frontend,tunnel -c green,blue,yellow --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev -w=api" "npm run dev -w=frontend" "npm run tunnel -w=api"
scripts.typecheck: concurrently -n api,frontend,landing -c green,blue,magenta --kill-others-on-fail "npm run typecheck -w=api" "npm run typecheck -w=frontend" "npm run typecheck -w=landing"
scripts.dead-code: concurrently -n knip,slop-api,slop-frontend,methods -c magenta,green,blue,cyan "knip --reporter compact" "slop-scan scan packages/api --lint" "slop-scan scan packages/frontend --lint" "node detect-unused-methods.mjs"
